# Test data for GridDistance function
# Format: cell1 cell2 expected_distance
# All cell indexes are in hex (without 0x prefix)

# Distance from cell to itself = 0
89283082877ffff 89283082877ffff 0
85283473fffffff 85283473fffffff 0

# Distance from cell to immediate neighbor = 1
89283082877ffff 8928308282bffff 1
89283082877ffff 89283082863ffff 1
85283473fffffff 85283477fffffff 1
